sections.heading: Rare small-lot wines from a Sonoma family

items.title: Family-Owned Since 1991
items.body: Rooted right here in Santa Rosa, CA, with a real stake in doing it right.

sections.heading: About Sunce Winery
body: Sunce — ‘sun’ in Croatian — is a small, family-owned, ultra-premium winery on Olivet Road west of Santa Rosa, in the heart of Sonoma County's Russian River Valley. Founded by the Franicevic family in 1991, it has spent more than three decades making wine the way a family does: by hand, in small lots, with quality always preferred over quantity.

Each release is limited — sometimes to 200 cases or fewer — and spans rare varietals, single-vineyard designates, and classic blends, with many wines pre-sold to members through barrel futures. Tastings are by the glass in a relaxed, welcoming setting where kids are always free and well-behaved pets are welcome.
highlights: Rare varietals, vineyard designates & classic blends
Limited releases — often 200 cases or fewer

items.title: Wine Tastings
items.description: Seated tastings of current small-lot releases, $25 per person; free for members and up to two guests. Reservations recommended — capacity is limited.

items.title: Wine Club & Barrel Futures
items.description: Members taste free and reserve upcoming limited bottlings as barrel futures before they sell out.

items.title: Rare Varietals & Vineyard Designates
items.description: An ever-changing lineup of rare varietals, single-vineyard designates, and classic Sonoma blends made in tiny quantities.

items.title: Private Tastings & Events
items.description: Intimate gatherings hosted at the winery for members, clubs, and special occasions.

items.quote: A low-key, friendly, family-run winery — the kind of welcoming tasting room you make a point to stop at.
items.author: Tripadvisor reviewer

sections.heading: Hungry yet?
sections.body: Find us at 1839 Olivet Rd. Call (707) 526-9463 — we’re glad to help.
